stemHtml: What does the NOTAM "BASIC GNSS UNAVBL in a given area on Jan 5 from 17:30 to 20:00 UTC" imply for any aircraft operating in that area and time period?

options.a: Aircraft cannot rely on GNSS for navigation during 17:30 to 20:00 UTC on Jan 5 and must use alternative means of navigation.
options.b: The NOTAM is advisory; pilots may continue to use GNSS if a preflight RAIM prediction shows availability.
options.c: Only SBAS corrections are unavailable; basic GNSS remains authorized for en-route and approach, provided RAIM is available.
options.d: GNSS may still be used en-route, but is prohibited only for instrument approaches during 17:30 to 20:00 UTC on Jan 5.
